title: How I make my AI Agent remember everything
summary: JavaScript Mastery demonstrates a technique for implementing persistent memory in AI agents. The approach enables agents to retain and recall information across multiple interactions.
writeup: This video walks through a technique for giving AI agents persistent memory, so an agent can retain and recall information across multiple interactions rather than starting fresh each time. The relevance is practical: persistence is what lets agents maintain context over longer sessions and repeated conversations. The core takeaway is the memory approach itself, applied to agents and tied to context management.
